verification_results.output_excerpt: Empty stdout, exit code 0. TypeScript compilation passed with no errors.

✓ tests/unit/wal.test.ts (20 tests | 20 passed). Includes 4 new rotation tests: should NOT rotate under 5MB, should trigger rotation when exceeds WAL_MAX_SIZE, should clean up old archives keeping at most 3, should not break event write when rotation fails.
16 passed, 2 failed (pre-existing PROJECT_NOT_INITIALIZED in T4.1 and T4 multi-project — unrelated to WAL rotation). All T1-T3 and T5 WAL tests pass.

side_effects_observed: events.jsonl renamed to events-ISO-8601-timestamp.jsonl.bak when file exceeds 5MB
Fresh empty events.jsonl created after rotation
Archive files cleaned up — only 3 .jsonl.bak files retained
Console log emitted: '[WAL] Rotated events.jsonl → <archive path>'
Event write succeeds even when rotation fails (silent catch)
evidence.manual_run_excerpt:
--- npx tsc --noEmit ---
Exit code: 0, no errors

--- npx vitest run tests/unit/wal.test.ts ---
✓ WAL > rotation — events.jsonl archiving > should NOT rotate when file is under WAL_MAX_SIZE (5MB) 5ms
✓ WAL > rotation — events.jsonl archiving > should trigger rotation when file exceeds WAL_MAX_SIZE 28ms
  stdout: [WAL] Rotated events.jsonl → C:\Users\luo\AppData\Local\Temp\wal-test-...\events-2026-05-30T03-08-58-807Z.jsonl.bak
✓ WAL > rotation — events.jsonl archiving > should clean up old archives keeping at most 3 142ms
✓ WAL > rotation — events.jsonl archiving > should not break event write when rotation fails 7ms
All 20 tests passed (16 existing + 4 new).

out_of_scope_observations: Pre-existing test failures in wal-singleton-e2e.test.ts (T4.1, T4 multi-project): PROJECT_NOT_INITIALIZED error in ProjectManager.registerProject — unrelated to WAL rotation, should be fixed separately.
Pre-existing failures in property tests (startup-flow-ordering.property.test.ts, property-6.test.ts, property-2.test.ts) — all unrelated to WAL changes.
